conversational_phrases.有点东西: has some skill / has some moves
conversational_phrases.秀: style on / outplay / show off, depending on context
conversational_phrases.上西天: send him straight to hell, used jokingly

guidance: Use this glossary only when the Chinese audio supports the term.
Do not force League terminology into ordinary conversational speech.
Ability letters spoken aloud should remain separate, such as Q A E, unless the audio clearly forms another word.
Prefer the speaker's conversational intent over literal character-by-character translation.
